title: Cobalt Caverns
description: Adds Cobalt to the Deep Dark and its equivalent tools and armor!
body:
# What does Cobalt Caverns Add?
Cobalt Caverns adds cobalt ore to the deep dark; it's a rather rare ore for which you will have to work hard to get enough for the tools or armor. This mod is a work in progress with much more to be added, so please give any suggestions to the discord! I have large plans for this mod moving forward and hope to see you guys join me through the process!

# What is planned for the future?
Much, much more! Namely a Dimension for the Deep Dark, and some more ores added to the nether, and the end, used to upgrade tools and armor, or simply as decoration! Some will also have their own special effects!

# FAQ

## How do I craft a Cobalt Ingot?
One cobalt ingot is made from 8 cobalt nuggets and one Netherite ingot. You get cobalt nuggets from smelting raw cobalt in a furnace or blast furnace.

## How much better is Cobalt than Netherite?
The jump from Netherite to Cobalt is a small one, but it is there, it also improves your knockback resistance! The main jump will be seen in the future once this mod gets implemented with my next one!

## Where can I report a bug I found?
You can report bugs in the discord!

# Can I support you?
If you want to support me, you can either go to Ko-Fi and support me there, or you can also support me by getting a Server from [ZapHosting](https://zap-hosting.com/SkjoldrRaven) using my affiliate link. Either way, I appreciate your support and I hope you enjoy my mods!
